ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy performed by this branch.

phase_gate.reason: The physical local TTS/STT receipt is proven locally; native macOS/Android audio API lanes and native STT/TTS candidates remain next gaps.

evidence_refs: scripts/speech_teacher_receipt.sh -> live no-Python macOS say/afconvert/sox/whisper-cli witness
.cache/speech-teacher-receipt/20260615T160958Z/speech-teacher-receipt.json -> live receipt with overlap=100, wav_bytes=69530, samples=32717, duration_ms=2045
form/form-stdlib/speech-model-learning.fk -> receipt row, validity gate, feature lowering, sample lowering, score card
docs/coherence-substrate/speech-teacher-receipt.form -> body-readable floor, north star, not-claimed, and next gaps

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Cells and recipes can now consume a physical local TTS/STT teacher receipt as explicit Form-native speech training data while refusing missing or low-quality receipt rows.
public_endpoints: not-applicable: local hardware/model carrier proof only
test_flows: Generate macOS TTS audio with say.
Lower audio to 16 kHz mono PCM with afconvert.
Measure physical audio features with sox.
Transcribe the retained WAV with local whisper-cli and ggml-large-v3-turbo.
Hash WAV and transcript artifacts, write a JSON receipt, and require at least 80 percent expected-token overlap.
Validate the receipt shape four-way in Form and lower it into a native training sample.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Speech learning had static observed local audio rows and oracle-distillation rows, but no repeatable live no-Python TTS/STT teacher receipt witness.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: A local Mac can emit a live macOS say -> 16 kHz PCM -> local whisper-cli receipt with overlap=100, nonzero audio metrics, retained artifact hashes, and Form four-way acceptance as native training data.
new_receipts: speech-teacher-receipt 20260615T160958Z overlap=100 wav_bytes=69530 samples=32717 duration_ms=2045 rms_ppm=164725 rough_hz=731
